reference: Hi, the pill should be effective since it does not pass through the bowel and is digested in the stomach. Even with diarrhea, it is still possible to retain the food for some time in the stomach. The effectiveness of the pill can only be lessened if there is vomiting soon after pill intake. Please take proper treatment for diarrhea. The pill can protect when taken within seventy-two hours of unprotected intercourse, and it is a one-time protection. It cannot cover multiple occasions. Please consider using a regular form of contraception. I hope this helps.
